tagline: Generations of Fun — Your One Stop Pool, Hot Tub, Supply & Service Store

hero.headline:
44 Years of Backyard Dreams
Built Right
hero.subheadline: Your family deserves a backyard that brings everyone together. DesRochers Backyard Pools & Spas has been designing, building, and servicing pools across Northern Illinois since 1982 — so you can stop planning and start splashing.

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Everything for Your Backyard<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From custom pool construction to hot tubs, patio furniture, and a fully stocked supply store — DesRochers is the only name you need for your backyard oasis.

cards.title: Inground Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom fiberglass and vinyl liner inground pools designed around your family's lifestyle. Award-winning quality and close collaboration from first sketch to final splash.

cards.title: Pool Service & Maintenance
cards.description: Water chemistry management, seasonal openings and closings, equipment diagnostics, and fiberglass repairs. We keep your pool crystal clear year after year.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Restore your pool's look and function with professional vinyl liner replacement. Expert measurement, pattern selection, and seamless installation.

cards.title: Hot Tub Sales & Installation
cards.description: Authorized Caldera and Fantasy Spas dealer. From choosing the perfect model to delivery and setup, we make hot tub ownership effortless.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Supply Store
cards.description: Three fully stocked retail locations with chemicals, equipment, parts, and accessories. Our knowledgeable staff guides you through every aspect of pool and spa care.

cards.title: Patio Furniture
cards.description: Premium outdoor furniture from Mallin Casual Furniture. Durable, stylish pieces that complete your backyard retreat and stand up to Illinois weather.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Schedule a Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us your vision. We'll visit your property, discuss your ideas, and provide an honest, detailed quote — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Build Together
steps.description: Our award-winning team collaborates with you at every stage. From design approval through construction, you're involved and informed the entire way.

steps.title: Enjoy for Generations
steps.description: Dive into your new backyard oasis knowing DesRochers is here for ongoing service, supplies, and support — just like we have been for families since 1982.

about.label: Why Northern Illinois Trusts Us
about.headline: A Family Business That Treats You Like Family
about.description: Since 1982, the DesRochers family has been building pools, relationships, and memories across Northern Illinois. With three retail locations, nationally recognized pool designs, and a team that remembers your name year after year — we are more than a pool company. We are your neighbors, and we take that seriously.

features.title: 44 Years of Expertise
features.description: Four decades of building, servicing, and perfecting backyard pools means there's no challenge we haven't solved and no design we can't bring to life.

features.title: Three Convenient Locations
features.description: Visit us in Wilmington, Shorewood, or Morris for supplies, expert advice, or to explore hot tubs and patio furniture in person.

features.title: True One-Stop Shop
features.description: Pool construction, maintenance, hot tubs, furniture, and supplies all under one roof. No more running between vendors — we handle everything.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique. Contact us for a personalized quote tailored to your backyard, your needs, and your budget.

guarantee.headline: Our "Family Promise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every pool we build and every service call we make. If something isn't right, call us and we'll make it right — no excuses, no runaround. That's the DesRochers way, and it has been for 44 years.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build an inground pool?
faqs.answer: Most inground pool projects take 6 to 10 weeks depending on design complexity and permits. We keep you updated at every stage and work efficiently to get you swimming as soon as possible.

faqs.question: Do you offer pool service for pools you didn't build?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We service all pool types — fiberglass, vinyl liner, and concrete — regardless of who built them. Many of our long-term service customers came to us after having pools installed elsewhere.

faqs.question: Which hot tub brands do you carry?
faqs.answer: We are an authorized dealer for Caldera Spas and Fantasy Spas. Visit any of our three locations to see models on display, test water features, and find the perfect fit for your space and budget.

faqs.question: Can I visit your store for just chemicals and supplies?
faqs.answer: Of course! Our Wilmington, Shorewood, and Morris locations are fully stocked with BioGuard chemicals, replacement parts, accessories, and more. Our staff can also test your water and recommend the right treatment.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool construction?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work with several financing partners to make your dream pool affordable. Contact us or visit a retail location to discuss payment options and get pre-qualified.

testimonials.name: Leo R.
testimonials.text: DesRochers installed our inground pool 10 years ago and we're still impressed with the level of service the company provides.

testimonials.name: Jim K.
testimonials.text: DesRochers Backyard Pools didn't only fix the major mistakes made by another company — they actually made it look brand new.

testimonials.name: Belle H.
testimonials.text: DesRochers' whole team are the BEST! The retail and service staff all are true pool professionals.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform Your
Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Get a free consultation and honest quote. Whether you're building a new pool, need service, or want to browse hot tubs and furniture — we're here for you.
